passage.title: A Day with Use of Want
passage.text: I want water. I want to go home. He wants a new job. She wants to learn English. We want a big house. They want to finish this project. Do you want tea? I do not want this book. He wants to talk to me. I want some rest.
passage.hindiTranslation: मुझे पानी चाहिए। मुझे घर जाना है। वह एक नई नौकरी चाहता है। वह English सीखना चाहती है। हम एक बड़ा घर चाहते हैं। वे इस project को खत्म करना चाहते हैं। क्या तुम्हें चाय चाहिए? मुझे यह किताब नहीं चाहिए। वह मुझसे बात करना चाहता है। मुझे कुछ आराम चाहिए।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I want water...."?
options: I do not want this book.
I do not want any mistake.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I want water."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I want to go..."?
options: He wants to talk to me.
I want to finish this work quickly.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I want to go home."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He wants a new..."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He wants a new job."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She wants to learn..."?
options: Do you want to go outside?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She wants to learn English."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "We want a big..."?
options: She wants to become a doctor.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "We want a big house."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "They want to finish..."?
options: I want to know the truth.
They want to finish this project.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: They want to finish this project.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "They want to finish this project."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "Do you want tea?..."?
options: She wants to start her own business.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "Do you want tea?"

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I do not want..."?
options: I do not want any mistake.
I do not want this book.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I do not want this book.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I do not want this book."
